moments.title: FIFA World Cup Quarterfinals & Semifinals
moments.blurb: The 2026 FIFA World Cup heats up with Quarterfinal matches from July 9-11 and Semifinals on July 14-15, as teams battle for a spot in the final.

angles.name: Quarterfinal build-up
angles.copy: Who's making it to the final four? The FIFA World Cup Quarterfinals kick off this week, get ready for some nail-biting action!

angles.name: Semifinal anticipation
angles.copy: The World Cup Semifinals are just around the corner! Two titanic clashes, but who will earn their place in the biggest game of all?

moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships conclude this weekend, with the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals scheduled for July 11-12.

angles.name: Finals weekend build-up
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! The iconic Wimbledon finals weekend is here, who will lift the coveted trophies on Centre Court?

angles.name: London focus
angles.copy: The eyes of the tennis world are on SW19 this weekend! London is buzzing for the Wimbledon finals – who are you backing?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's Chart Domination
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holds the UK Singles Chart No. 1 for a staggering 15th non-consecutive week, making chart history.

angles.name: Chart record talk
angles.copy: Fifteen weeks at No. 1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are absolutely smashing it with 'Rein Me In'. Is this the biggest song of the year?

angles.name: Sam Fender's success
angles.copy: Geordie hero Sam Fender and Olivia Dean are still reigning supreme at No. 1! 'Rein Me In' continues its incredible chart run. Buzzing!

moments.title: The Open Championship Practice Days
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale begins its practice days from July 12-15, ahead of the main tournament.

angles.name: Golf excitement
angles.copy: The Open is almost here! Practice days begin this week at Royal Birkdale, as the world's best golfers get ready to tackle the links.

angles.name: Birkdale buzz
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is preparing to host The Open! The atmosphere will be building throughout the practice days, starting July 12.

moments.title: Diane Morgan's 'Ann Droid' on BBC
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in 'Ann Droid', a new BBC comedy set in 2029 about a robot companion, premiering in July.

angles.name: New comedy anticipation
angles.copy: Diane Morgan (aka Philomena Cunk) is back! Her new comedy 'Ann Droid' is coming to BBC One and iPlayer this July. Expect laughs.

angles.name: Sci-fi comedy hook
angles.copy: A robot companion to help the elderly? What could possibly go wrong when Diane Morgan is involved? Catch 'Ann Droid' this month on BBC.

moments.title: 'Little House on the Prairie' Netflix Adaptation
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of 'Little House on the Prairie' based on Laura Ingalls Wilder's books premieres on Netflix on July 9.

angles.name: Nostalgia hook
angles.copy: Get ready for a trip back to the American West! A new 'Little House on the Prairie' adaptation lands on Netflix July 9.

angles.name: Family viewing
angles.copy: Perfect for family viewing! The classic 'Little House on the Prairie' story gets a fresh take on Netflix from July 9.

moments.title: Huey Lewis turns 76
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter and actor Huey Lewis, known for his band Huey Lewis and the News, celebrates his 76th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy birthday Huey
angles.copy: Happy 76th birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis! 'The Power of Love' and so many more timeless hits. What's your favourite?

angles.name: 80s icon
angles.copy: An 80s icon celebrating his birthday today! Sending big wishes to Huey Lewis, still bringing that infectious pop-rock sound.

moments.title: RZA turns 57
moments.blurb: Rapper, producer, actor, and de facto leader of the Wu-Tang Clan, RZA, celebrates his 57th birthday today.

angles.name: Hip-hop legend
angles.copy: Happy 57th birthday to the one and only RZA! The mastermind behind Wu-Tang Clan's iconic sound. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Wu-Tang Forever
angles.copy: A true hip-hop legend is celebrating today! Big birthday wishes to RZA. Wu-Tang Clan ain't nothin' to mess with!

moments.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, will celebrate his 86th birthday on July 7.

angles.name: Beatles legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! The iconic Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo?

angles.name: Drumming icon
angles.copy: An absolute drumming legend turns 86 this week! Huge birthday wishes going out to The Beatles' very own Ringo Starr.

moments.title: Jack White turns 51
moments.blurb: Rock musician, singer-songwriter, and producer Jack White, known for The White Stripes and his solo work, celebrates his 51st birthday on July 9.

angles.name: Rock icon birthday
angles.copy: Happy 51st birthday to the incredible Jack White! From White Stripes to solo brilliance, a true rock 'n' roll force.

angles.name: White Stripes tribute
angles.copy: Celebrating Jack White's birthday on July 9! What's your go-to White Stripes anthem or favourite solo track?

moments.title: Courtney Love turns 62
moments.blurb: Singer, songwriter, and actress Courtney Love, frontwoman of the band Hole, celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9.

angles.name: Grunge legend
angles.copy: Happy 62nd birthday to the iconic Courtney Love! A true force in rock music. What's your favourite Hole song?

angles.name: 90s rock queen
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of 90s rock queen Courtney Love on July 9! Her influence is undeniable.

moments.title: Jim Kerr turns 67
moments.blurb: Scottish singer-songwriter Jim Kerr, lead vocalist of the band Simple Minds, celebrates his 67th birthday on July 9.

angles.name: Simple Minds frontman
angles.copy: Happy 67th birthday to Simple Minds frontman Jim Kerr! 'Don't You (Forget About Me)' and so many more anthems.

angles.name: Scottish music icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of Scotland's own Jim Kerr from Simple Minds on July 9! A true legend of rock.

moments.title: Marc Almond turns 69
moments.blurb: English singer-songwriter Marc Almond, best known as one half of the synth-pop duo Soft Cell, celebrates his 69th birthday on July 9.

angles.name: Synth-pop legend
angles.copy: Happy 69th birthday to the brilliant Marc Almond! From Soft Cell's 'Tainted Love' to his solo career, a true icon.

angles.name: 80s throwback
angles.copy: Celebrating 80s synth-pop royalty today! Sending birthday wishes to Marc Almond on July 9. What's your favourite Soft Cell track?

moments.title: Olly Alexander turns 35
moments.blurb: English singer, songwriter, and actor Olly Alexander, known as the lead singer of Years & Years, celebrates his 35th birthday on July 15.

angles.name: Pop star birthday
angles.copy: Happy 35th birthday to the incredible Olly Alexander! From Years & Years hits to his acting roles, a multi-talented star.

angles.name: Years & Years favourite
angles.copy: Celebrating Olly Alexander's birthday on July 15! What's your favourite Years & Years track that always gets you dancing?

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt turns 79
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning American singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile career spanning rock, country, and pop, celebrates her 79th birthday on July 15.

angles.name: Music legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Linda Ronstadt! A voice that defined generations across rock, country, and pop.

angles.name: Timeless voice
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of the incredible Linda Ronstadt on July 15! Her timeless voice continues to captivate.

moments.title: Northern Ireland School Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: School summer holidays in Northern Ireland officially began on July 1, running through to September 1.

angles.name: NI holidays start
angles.copy: While some of us are still counting down, Northern Ireland schools are officially on summer holidays! Enjoy the break!

angles.name: Summer vibes
angles.copy: Longer days and no school! Northern Ireland students are already enjoying their summer break. Who's ready for a getaway?

moments.title: ITV Thriller 'The Dark' Premieres
moments.blurb: A new ITV crime thriller, 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, premieres on ITV1 and ITVX on July 12.

angles.name: New crime drama
angles.copy: Get ready for a gripping new crime thriller! ITV's 'The Dark' premieres July 12, set in the Scottish Highlands. Looks chilling!

angles.name: Weekend watch
angles.copy: Your next 'hide behind the sofa' drama is coming! 'The Dark' hits ITV1 and ITVX on July 12. Perfect weekend viewing.

moments.title: Genesis Scottish Open
moments.blurb: The Genesis Scottish Open, a major golf tournament, takes place at The Renaissance Club in North Berwick from July 9-12.

angles.name: Scottish golf
angles.copy: Major golf action returns to Scotland this week! The Genesis Scottish Open kicks off at The Renaissance Club on July 9.

angles.name: Links golf
angles.copy: Some of the world's best golfers are heading to North Berwick for the Genesis Scottish Open, starting July 9. Who's your pick?

moments.title: 'Trying' Season 5 on Apple TV+
moments.blurb: The acclaimed British comedy-drama 'Trying' returns for its fifth season on Apple TV+ on July 8.

angles.name: Comedy-drama return
angles.copy: 'Trying' is back! The much-loved British comedy-drama returns for its fifth season on Apple TV+ this Wednesday, July 8.

angles.name: Apple TV+ must-watch
angles.copy: Need a new binge? Season 5 of the heartwarming 'Trying' drops on Apple TV+ on July 8. Get ready for more laughs and tears!
